_comment_server_label: Human-readable name shown in all notifications
_comment_services: List systemd service names to monitor.
Remove any service this server does NOT run.
Common values: nginx, mysql, redis-server, mongod, postgresql
_comment_java_wars: Each entry = one Java application to monitor.
name          : display name used in notifications
port          : PREFERRED — TCP port the app listens on.
A port check is more reliable than ps matching.
process_match : FALLBACK — unique string in 'ps -ef' output.
Use this only if you cannot determine the port.
Remove entries for apps not running on this server.
Leave java_wars as [] if this server has no Java apps.

java_wars.name: zc-v3.1-user-scheduler-svc
java_wars._note: Example: use process_match when port is shared or unknown

_comment_disk_mounts: List every mount point to monitor.
threshold_gb : alert when free space drops BELOW this value
Remove entries for mounts that don't exist on this server.
Leave disk_mounts as [] to disable disk checks.
_comment_resources: CPU and memory monitoring via psutil.
Set enabled to false to disable entirely (e.g. low-power servers).
